problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
